blended.narrative: Arapahoe Basin is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.4 inches of light, fluffy snow expected. Snow levels around 6,328 ft.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 6" of snow, highs of 33°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
